Imago Dei (image of God) is the concept that humans are manifestations of [[alo]] and thus have a chain of [[genki]] [[agape]] progressing through you. <ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gW6djxNs270</ref>

Being in the image of God means we are capable of emanating [[lambda]] and [[omega]] and becoming the [[alpha]].<ref name=":0" />

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Imago Dei]][[Category:Theology]]
[[sn:Imago Dei]][[sn:Imago Dei]][[Category:Great chain of being]]
[[sn:Imago Dei]]
[[Category:Pages]]
